summary: Integrated ADR 0255 on synchronized main release 0.177.85 by replaying the exact-main Matrix converge from release commit cdf1b9a4adaaa35b048f7ecd41e4d6087c07e5cf, correcting the public HTTPS/TLS assurance lane from source commit 169d7e6549e539747d140497acd8a01e9049c330 so blackbox probes connect through the internal edge with matrix.lv3.org as the hostname override, and re-verifying public publication, controller access, runtime health, and monitoring evidence while platform version remained 0.130.58 on top of the already-recorded ADR 0264 mainline baseline.

verification.check: Latest origin/main baseline and protected release context
verification.observed: `git fetch origin --prune` confirmed the newest published `origin/main` baseline had advanced to commit `430e364e`, which marked ADR 0264 merged on main; ADR 0255 was rebased onto that head before the final metadata recording, while repository version `0.177.85` and platform version `0.130.58` remained the synchronized mainline context.

verification.check: Focused Matrix regression and repository automation coverage
verification.observed: `uv run --with pytest --with pyyaml python -m pytest -q tests/test_edge_publication_makefile.py tests/test_matrix_synapse_runtime_role.py tests/test_matrix_synapse_postgres_role.py tests/test_matrix_synapse_playbook.py tests/test_generate_platform_vars.py` returned `26 passed in 1.26s`; `make syntax-check-matrix-synapse` passed; and `make pre-push-gate` passed on the rebased ADR 0255 workstream branch before the protected main integration.

`uv run --with pytest --with pyyaml pytest -q tests/test_https_tls_assurance_targets.py tests/test_monitoring_vm_role.py` returned `16 passed in 0.34s` after the internal-edge connect-target fix for public blackbox probes.

`make converge-matrix-synapse` completed successfully from release commit `cdf1b9a4adaaa35b048f7ecd41e4d6087c07e5cf`, with final recap `docker-runtime-lv3 ok=131 changed=5 failed=0`, `localhost ok=18 changed=0 failed=0`, `nginx-lv3 ok=38 changed=3 failed=0`, `postgres-lv3 ok=51 changed=0 failed=0`, and `proxmox_florin ok=31 changed=4 failed=0`.

verification.check: Exact-main monitoring replay after internal-edge assurance correction
verification.observed: `make converge-monitoring` completed successfully from source commit `169d7e6549e539747d140497acd8a01e9049c330`, with final recap `backup-lv3 ok=14 changed=0 failed=0`, `coolify-lv3 ok=14 changed=0 failed=0`, `docker-build-lv3 ok=46 changed=0 failed=0`, `docker-runtime-lv3 ok=72 changed=2 failed=0`, `monitoring-lv3 ok=397 changed=2 failed=0`, `nginx-lv3 ok=150 changed=3 failed=0`, `postgres-lv3 ok=38 changed=0 failed=0`, and `proxmox_florin ok=100 changed=0 failed=0`.

verification.check: Public and controller Matrix endpoint plus login verification
verification.observed: `https://matrix.lv3.org/_matrix/client/versions` returned `status 200` from `server nginx` with `versions_count 20` and `unstable_features 34`; `https://matrix.lv3.org/_matrix/client/v3/login` returned `status 200` in `0.60s` with `user_id @ops:matrix.lv3.org`, `home_server matrix.lv3.org`, and well-known base `https://matrix.lv3.org/`; `http://100.64.0.1:8015/_matrix/client/versions` returned `status 200` with `server Synapse/1.150.0`; the controller login path also returned `status 200` in `9.27s`; and `sudo ss -ltnp` on `proxmox_florin` confirmed the controller listener is bound on `100.64.0.1:8015`.

`sudo docker compose --file /opt/matrix-synapse/docker-compose.yml ps --format json` on `docker-runtime-lv3` showed `matrixdotorg/synapse:v1.150.0` in `running` state with status `Up 3 hours (healthy)` and the `openbao-agent` sidecar healthy.

verification.check: Monitoring rule, target, and probe-success verification
verification.observed: Prometheus on `monitoring-lv3` reported `probe_success{job="https-tls-blackbox",assurance_id="matrix-synapse-public"} = 1`, `up{job="matrix_synapse-readiness"} = 1`, and `up{job="matrix_synapse-liveness"} = 1`. The live target file at `/etc/prometheus/file_sd/https-tls-targets.yml` now points Matrix at `https://10.10.10.10:443/_matrix/client/versions` with `probe_hostname: matrix.lv3.org`, and `/etc/prometheus/rules/https-tls-alerts.yml` still carries the `matrix-synapse-public` alert definitions.

notes: This canonical receipt supersedes the branch-local evidence in `2026-03-29-adr-0255-matrix-synapse-live-apply` and the earlier exact-main candidate that predated the internal-edge HTTPS assurance correction.

Public HTTPS/TLS blackbox probes now connect to the shared internal edge `10.10.10.10` with the public hostname override because guest-network hairpin access to `65.108.75.123:443` is not reliable from `monitoring-lv3`.

Platform version remained `0.130.58` on this merge because the latest `origin/main` baseline already carried ADR 0264's exact-main live-apply truth before ADR 0255 recorded its final synchronized-main receipt.
